## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (incorrect info, broken link, notebook error)
- [ ] New content (new section, notebook, resource)
- [ ] Update (improved explanation, updated salary/tool info)
- [ ] Translation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Which section(s) does this affect?

<!-- List the files/sections changed -->

## Checklist

### For all PRs
- [ ] I've read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My changes are accurate and verified
- [ ] Links work and point to the right place
- [ ] No plagiarized content

### For notebooks specifically
- [ ] Notebook runs from top to bottom without errors
- [ ] Tested on Google Colab
- [ ] Output is cleared before committing
- [ ] Includes markdown explanations (not just code)
- [ ] Includes "Try it yourself" exercises

### For resource additions
- [ ] Resource is free OR clearly labeled as paid
- [ ] I've personally used or verified this resource
- [ ] Includes brief description of what makes it worth including
